dependent_to.description:
Wavelet and simulated Annealing SliP inversion (WASP). This code uses a
nonlinear simulated annealing inversion method to model slip amplitude,
rake, rupture time, and rise time on a discretized fault plane, finding
the solution that best fits the observations in the wavelet domain.
dependent_to.name: neic-finitefault

dependent_to.description:

Python astronomy packages.

dependent_to.description:
Py.test plugin for validating Jupyter notebooks. The plugin adds
functionality to py.test to recognise and collect Jupyter notebooks. The
intended purpose of the tests is to determine whether execution of the
stored inputs match the stored outputs of the .ipynb file. Whilst also
ensuring that the notebooks are running without errors.
dependent_to.name: py-nbval
